Title: Guest checkout (one-off payment)
Content:
Guest checkout, also known as a one-off payment, is the simplest way for customers to complete a transaction without needing to create an account. During this process, customers enter their card details, authenticate themselves, and finalize their purchase.

Guest checkout flow

Private notes

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

1. Create a payment session

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. Collect card information

Implement {{variable.card_session_js}} on your page. Collect the card information using Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler). This will collect the card information and send it to Xendit using {{variable.card_session_js}}.

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Important: Store the payment_request_id. You'll need it to retrieve the transaction's status and it will be included in the payment webhook for status updates.

3. Redirect to the authentication page

Redirect your customer to the authentication page provided by the action_url from the response object. This is where the cardholder completes the 3D Secure authentication.

4. Customer completes authentication

After successfully authenticating, your customer will be redirected to your success_return_url. If authentication fails, they will be redirected to your failure_return_url.

5. Receive the webhook

Xendit will send a payment webhook to your configured webhook endpoint, indicating the final status of the transaction. You can match this webhook with the payment_request_id you stored earlier.

Example payment.capture webhook:

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

It's recommended to save the payment_id and payment_details from the webhook, correlated with the payment_request_id, as proof of payment.

Guest checkout without authentication (one-off payment)

We highly recommend performing authentication when processing card transactions. Authentication does not only provide a liability shift (protecting you from certain fraud disputes), it additionally ensures users are who they say they are.

However, upon request and after a risk-based assessment, Xendit can activate guest checkout without mandating authentication. We’ll perform a risk-based assessment, before allowing you to accept transactions without authentication.

Guest checkout flow without authentication

Private notes

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return payment_request_id
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

How to implement

1. Create a payment session

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 10000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": true
        }
    },
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "UNIQUE_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T05:07:14.585Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T05:07:14.585Z",

    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": true
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. Gather the card information

Similar to the authenticated flow, Initiate {{variable.card_session_js}} on your page and use Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler) to collect the card details. This will collect the card information and send it to Xendit using {{variable.card_session_js}}.

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
    "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID" 
}

Important: Make sure to store the payment_request_id as you’ll need it to retrieve the state of the transaction at a later stage.

3. Receive the webhook

Xendit will immediately send a payment webhook to your webhook endpoint with the final transaction status. You can match the payment webhook with the payment_request_id.

Example payment.capture webhook

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",

        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }

As with the authenticated flow, you can save the payment_id and payment_details correlated with the payment_request_id as proof of payment.

4. Get the status of the transaction

If you prefer to poll for the transaction status rather than relying solely on webhooks, you can use the GET Payment Request endpoint with your payment_request_id.

Request: GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/YOUR_PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID

This will return the status of the transaction.

Title: Guest checkout (one-off payment)
Content:
Guest checkout, juga dikenal sebagai one-off payment, adalah cara paling sederhana bagi pelanggan untuk menyelesaikan transaksi tanpa perlu membuat akun. Selama proses ini, pelanggan memasukkan detail kartu mereka, mengautentikasi diri mereka sendiri, dan menyelesaikan pembelian mereka.

Alur guest checkout

Catatan pribadi

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

1. Buat payment session

Request - POST /sesi

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sesi

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. Kumpulkan informasi kartu

a. Buat {{variable.card_session_js}} di halaman Anda.

b. Kumpulkan informasi kartu menggunakan Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler). Ini akan mengumpulkan informasi kartu dan mengirimkannya ke Xendit dengan {{variable.card_session_js}}.

Permintaan - untuk card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

response - dari card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Penting: Simpan payment_request_id . Anda akan memerlukannya untuk mengambil status transaksi dan akan disertakan dalam webhook pembayaran untuk pembaruan status.

3. Alihkan ke halaman otentikasi

Alihkan pembeli ke halaman otentikasi yang disediakan oleh action_url objek respons dari pembeli. Di sinilah pemegang kartu menyelesaikan otentikasi 3D Secure.

4. Pembeli menyelesaikan otentikasi

Setelah berhasil mengautentikasi, pembeli akan diarahkan ke success_return_url . Jika otentikasi gagal, autentikasi akan dialihkan ke failure_return_url.

5. Terima webhook

Xendit akan mengirimkan webhook pembayaran ke titik akhir webhook Anda yang dikonfigurasi, menunjukkan status akhir transaksi. Anda dapat mencocokkan webhook ini dengan yang payment_request_id Anda simpan sebelumnya.

Contoh payment.capture webhook:

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"
    },
    "api_version": "v3"
}

Disarankan untuk menyimpan payment_id dan payment_details dari webhook, yang berkorelasi dengan payment_request_id, sebagai bukti pembayaran.

Guest checkout tanpa autentikasi (one-off payment)

Kami sangat menyarankan Anda untuk melakukan autentikasi saat memproses transaksi kartu. Autentikasi tidak hanya memberikan liability shift (melindungi Anda dari dispute penipuan tertentu), tetapi juga untuk memverifikasi identitas pengguna.

Namun, berdasarkan permintaan dan setelah penilaian berbasis resiko, Xendit dapat mengaktifkan guest checkout tanpa mewajibkan autentikasi. Kami akan melakukan penilaian berbasis risiko sebelum mengizinkan Anda menerima transaksi tanpa autentikasi.

Alur guest checkout tanpa autentikasi

Catatan pribadi

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return payment_request_id
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

Cara menerapkan

1. Buat payment session

Request - POST /sesi

{

    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",

            "skip_three_ds": true
        }
    },

            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {

        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

{
    "payment_session_id": "UNIQUE_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",

2. Kumpulkan informasi kartu

Mirip dengan alur yang diautentikasi, buat {{variable.card_session_js}} pada halaman Anda dan gunakan Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler) untuk mengumpulkan informasi kartu. Ini akan mengumpulkan detail kartu dan mengirimkannya ke Xendit menggunakan {{variable.card_session_js}}.

Request - untuk card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",

3. Terima webhook

Xendit akan segera mengirimkan webhook pembayaran ke endpoint webhook Anda dengan status transaksi akhir. Anda dapat mencocokkan webhook pembayaran dengan payment_request_id.

Title: การชำระเงินในฐานะแขก (การชำระเงินครั้งเดียว)
Content:
Guest checkout หรือที่เรียกว่าการชำระเงินครั้งเดียว (one-off payment) เป็นวิธีที่ง่ายที่สุดสำหรับลูกค้าในการทำธุรกรรมให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์โดยไม่จำเป็นต้องสร้างบัญชี ในระหว่างกระบวนการนี้ ลูกค้าจะกรอกรายละเอียดบัตร ทำการยืนยันตัวตน และดำเนินการซื้อให้เสร็จสิ้น

ขั้นตอนการทำ Guest checkout

บันทึกส่วนตัว

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

1. สร้างเซสชันการชำระเงิน (Create a payment session)

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "XENDIT_GENERATED_CUSTOMER_ID",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. รวบรวมข้อมูลบัตร (Collect card information)

ติดตั้ง {{variable.card_session_js}} บน หน้าเพจของคุณ รวบรวมข้อมูลบัตร โดยใช้ Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler) ซึ่งจะรวบรวมข้อมูลบัตรและส่งไปยัง Xendit โดยใช้ {{variable.card_session_js}}

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

สำคัญ: จัดเก็บ payment_request_id คุณจะต้องใช้ ID นี้เพื่อเรียกดูสถานะของธุรกรรม และ ID นี้จะถูกรวมอยู่ใน payment webhook สำหรับการอัปเดตสถานะ

3. Redirect ไปยังหน้าการยืนยันตัวตน (authentication page)

Redirect ลูกค้าของคุณไปยัง หน้าการยืนยันตัวตน ที่ระบุโดย action_url จาก response object นี่คือที่ที่ผู้ถือบัตรจะดำเนินการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์

4. ลูกค้าดำเนินการยืนยันตัวตนเสร็จสมบูรณ์

หลังจากยืนยันตัวตนสำเร็จ ลูกค้าของคุณจะถูก Redirect ไปยัง success_return_url ของคุณ หากการยืนยันตัวตนล้มเหลว ลูกค้าจะถูก Redirect ไปยัง failure_return_url ของคุณ

5. รับ webhook

Xendit จะส่ง payment webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ที่คุณกำหนดค่าไว้ เพื่อระบุสถานะสุดท้ายของธุรกรรม คุณสามารถจับคู่ webhook นี้กับ payment_request_id ที่คุณจัดเก็บไว้ก่อนหน้านี้

ตัวอย่าง payment.capture webhook:

{
    "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:35.109Z",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "event": "payment.capture",
    "data": {
        "type": "PAY",
        "status": "SUCCEEDED",
        "country": "ID",
        "created": "2024-12-18T05:46:08.192Z",
        "updated": "2024-12-18T05:46:30.627Z",
        "captures": [
            {
                "capture_id": "cptr-08f17fa3-e80c-4d8e-8c34-17aa3400bc1c",
                "capture_amount": 10000,
                "capture_timestamp": "2024-12-18T05:46:34.234Z"
            }
        ],
        "currency": "IDR",
        "payment_id": "py-3f57d678-2448-4c9f-a433-8468d366fb5c",
        "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
        "customer_id": "cust-7de9a9b4-37e8-40ad-b665-d97f42e538c5",
        "channel_code": "CARDS",
        "reference_id": "97ba0a32-b996-4abf-8a7b-6184a6644676_b8d18f2f-3",
        "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
        "request_amount": 10000,
        "payment_details": {
            "authorization_data": {
                "reconciliation_id": "7345007929096981703954",
                "authorization_code": "831000",
                "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
                "network_response_code": "00",
                "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
                "cvn_verification_result": "M",
                "retrieval_reference_number": "435205253972",
                "address_verification_result": "M",
                "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
            },
            "authentication_data": {
                "flow": "CHALLENGE",
                "a_res": {
                    "eci": "05",
                    "message_version": "2.1.0",
                    "authentication_value": "AAIBBYNoEwAAACcKhAJkdQAAAAA=","directory_server_trans_id": "e537f539-d59f-4ebe-8d56-7fdc31a8e9b4"
                }
            }
        },
        "payment_request_id": "pr-5593127f-8c7b-4d2f-b487-c785ffc21e2f"

ขอแนะนำให้บันทึก payment_id และ payment_details จาก webhook ที่สัมพันธ์กับ payment_request_id เพื่อใช้เป็นหลักฐานการชำระเงิน

Guest checkout โดยไม่มีการยืนยันตัวตน (one-off payment)

เราขอแนะนำอย่างยิ่งให้ ดำเนินการยืนยันตัวตน (authentication) เมื่อประมวลผลธุรกรรมบัตร การยืนยันตัวตนไม่เพียงแต่ให้ liability shift (ซึ่งช่วยปกป้องคุณจากการโต้แย้งการฉ้อโกงบางประเภท) แต่ยังช่วยให้มั่นใจได้ว่าผู้ใช้คือบุคคลที่พวกเขากล่าวอ้าง

อย่างไรก็ตาม เมื่อมีการร้องขอและหลังจากการประเมินความเสี่ยง (risk-based assessment) Xendit สามารถเปิดใช้งาน Guest checkout โดยไม่บังคับให้มีการยืนยันตัวตน เราจะดำเนินการประเมินความเสี่ยงก่อนที่จะอนุญาตให้คุณรับธุรกรรมโดยไม่มีการยืนยันตัวตน

ขั้นตอนการทำ Guest checkout โดยไม่มีการยืนยันตัวตน

บันทึกส่วนตัว

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return payment_request_id
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

วิธีการติดตั้ง (How to implement)

1. สร้างเซสชันการชำระเงิน (Create a payment session)

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 10000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "channel_properties": {
        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": true
        }
    },
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Lorem",
            "surname": "Ipsum"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "UNIQUE_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID",
    "created": "2024-11-28T05:07:14.585Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-28T05:07:14.585Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "new-uuid8",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 10000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-f945d691-2101-4582-890a-12afd211ea12",
    "expires_at": "2024-11-28T05:37:14.390Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",

        "cards": {
            "skip_three_ds": true
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. รวบรวมข้อมูลบัตร (Gather the card information)

คล้ายกับขั้นตอนที่มีการยืนยันตัวตน ให้เริ่มต้น {{variable.card_session_js}} บน หน้าเพจของคุณ และใช้ Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler) เพื่อ รวบรวมรายละเอียดบัตร ซึ่งจะรวบรวมข้อมูลบัตรและส่งไปยัง Xendit โดยใช้ {{variable.card_session_js}}

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "firstName",
    "cardholder_last_name": "lastName",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",

    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID" 
}

สำคัญ: ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่าได้จัดเก็บ payment_request_id เนื่องจากคุณจะต้องใช้ ID นี้เพื่อเรียกดูสถานะของธุรกรรมในภายหลัง

3. รับ webhook

Xendit จะส่ง payment webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ของคุณทันที พร้อมด้วยสถานะธุรกรรมสุดท้าย คุณสามารถจับคู่ payment webhook กับ payment_request_id.

ตัวอย่าง payment.capture webhook

Title: Pago como invitado (pago único)
Content:
El pago de invitado (Guest checkout), también conocido como un pago único (one-off payment), es la forma más sencilla para que los Clientes completen una Transacción sin necesidad de crear una Cuenta. Durante este proceso, los Clientes ingresan los detalles de su tarjeta, se autentican y finalizan su compra.

Flujo de Pago de Invitado (Guest checkout)

Notas privadas

sequenceDiagram
 actor EndUser as End User
 participant Client as Client App
 participant Server as Client Server
 participant cardsessionjs as Xendit card_session.js
 participant XenditServer as Xendit Server
 participant Authentication Page as Authentication Page
 EndUser ->> Client: Confirm checkout
 Client ->> Server: Send order details confirmation
 Server ->> XenditServer: Create Payment Session
 XenditServer ->> Server: Return Payment Session
 Server ->> Client: Send Payment Session ID
 Client ->> Client : Initiate card_session.js using Payment Session ID
 EndUser ->> Client: Input cards details
 Client ->> cardsessionjs: Send cards details
 cardsessionjs ->> Client: Return authentication url and the payment_request_id
 Client ->> Authentication Page: Redirect to issuer authentication page
 Authentication Page ->> Authentication Page: User completes payment process
 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_request_id
 Authentication Page ->> Client: Redirect back to your app
 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result

1. Crear una Payment Session

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "amount": 100000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "YOUR_CUSTOMER_REFERENCE",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "test@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+6212345678",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "Jaap",
            "surname": "Stam"
        }
    },
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-6746c1006b7752b4d91725af",
    "created": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "updated": "2024-11-27T06:49:36.535Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "currency": "IDR",

    "expires_at": "2024-11-27T07:19:36.434Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "CARDS_SESSION_JS",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID", 
    "cards_session_js": {
        "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/failure"
    }
}

2. Recopilar información de la tarjeta

Implemente {{variable.card_session_js}} en su página. Recopile la información de la tarjeta usando Xendit.payment.collectCardData(reqData, xenditResponseHandler). Esto recopilará la información de la tarjeta y la enviará a Xendit usando {{variable.card_session_js}}.

Request - to card_session_js 

{
    "card_number": "4000000000001091",
    "expiry_month": "12",
    "expiry_year": "2040",
    "cvn": "123",
    "cardholder_first_name": "Firstname",
    "cardholder_last_name": "Last",
    "cardholder_email": "shopper@emailaddress.com",
    "cardholder_phone_number": "+61111111111",
    "payment_session_id": "YOUR_PAYMENT_SESSION_ID"
}

Response - from card_session_js

{ 
    "message": "Status updated. Wait for a callback or get the status using the Get API.", 
    "payment_request_id": "PAYMENT_REQUEST_ID", 
    "action_url": "AUTHENTICATION_PAGE_URL" 
}

Importante: Almacene el payment_request_id. Lo necesitará para obtener el Estado de la Transacción y se incluirá en el payment webhook para las actualizaciones de Estado.

3. Redirigir a la página de authentication

Redirija a su Cliente a la página de authentication proporcionada por el action_url del response object. Aquí es donde el titular de la tarjeta completa la authentication 3D Secure.

4. El Cliente completa la authentication

Después de autenticarse exitosamente, su Cliente será redirigido a su success_return_url. Si la authentication falla, será redirigido a su failure_return_url.

5. Recibir el webhook

Xendit enviará un payment webhook a su endpoint de webhook configurado, indicando el Estado final de la Transacción. Puede hacer coincidir este webhook con el payment_request_id que almacenó anteriormente.

Ejemplo de payment.capture webhook:

Se recomienda guardar el payment_id y los payment_details del webhook, correlacionados con el payment_request_id, como comprobante de Pago.

Pago de invitado (Guest checkout) sin authentication (pago único)

Recomendamos encarecidamente realizar la authentication al procesar Transacciones con tarjeta. La authentication no solo proporciona una transferencia de responsabilidad (liability shift) (protegiéndole de ciertas disputas por fraude), sino que también asegura que los usuarios son quienes dicen ser.

Sin embargo, previa solicitud y después de una evaluación basada en riesgos, Xendit puede activar el pago de invitado (guest checkout) sin obligar a la authentication. Realizaremos una evaluación basada en riesgos antes de permitirle aceptar Transacciones sin authentication.

Flujo de Pago de Invitado (Guest checkout) sin authentication

 Client ->> Server: Send payment_request_id

 XenditServer -->> Server: Send payment webhook
 Server ->> Server: Match payment webhook with the payment_request_id
 Server ->> Server: Store payment_id for the payment_request_id
 Server -->> Client: Send payment result
